intro: Replace this block with a one-paragraph bio. Inline markdown works — **bold**, `code`, and [links](https://example.com). Every field below is optional; empty arrays hide the entire section.

education.sub: Optional extra line — honours, concentration, residential college, etc.
education.activities: Optional: student societies, TA roles, clubs, comma-separated.

experience.desc: A short, concrete description of what you actually did. Inline `code` and **bold** are supported.
Another two or three sentences of impact-oriented copy.

volunteering.desc: Optional one-line description of the work.

focus.name: What you are picking up next
